name: Happened at work: firm ignored AI, boss retaliates with cuts—options?

mainEntity.name: Happened at work: firm ignored AI, boss retaliates with cuts—options?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Document audits showing lead impact, propose recognition budget.** Ties visibility to revenue. **Key factors:** 1) ROI proof; 2) Competitor data; 3) Low-cost starts; 4) Trial period. Pitch as investment, track wins. Avoid confrontation.[1]
